description:
PagePilot is an e-book reader built for iPhone that lets you turn pages hands-free using your Apple Watch.

CORE FEATURES

▸ Apple Watch Page Control
Read on iPhone or iPad, then flick your wrist or press the Digital Crown to go to the next page. No touching the screen required — perfect for reading in bed, during meals, or on the go.

▸ Multiple Formats
Supports EPUB, PDF, Audiobooks, and CBZ comics. One app for your entire library.

▸ WiFi Transfer
Open a URL on your computer's browser, drag files in, and they appear in your library instantly. No cable, no iCloud required.

▸ Device Transfer
Send books directly between your iPhone and iPad over the same Wi-Fi network.

▸ Reading Stats
Track your daily and weekly reading time, monitor your progress, and maintain a reading streak.

▸ Library Management
Grid or list view, sort by recent import, recent read, title, or author. Multi-select and bulk delete.

▸ Text-to-Speech (TTS)
Full system voice support with adjustable speed and pitch.

▸ Daily Reading Goal
Set a daily reading goal in minutes and track your progress from the home screen.

WHY PAGEPILOT?

PagePilot was built for one reason: poking at your screen to turn a page shouldn't be the friction point in your reading experience. Whether you're standing on the subway, lying in bed, or on a treadmill, Watch page control makes reading feel more natural.

PagePilot Pro unlocks unlimited books (free version holds up to 10), weekly/monthly/yearly reading stats, streak tracking, and the ability to use Apple Watch on iPad.

PagePilot keeps these features free forever: basic Watch page turning, WiFi transfer, and device-to-device transfer — because these are the prerequisites for getting value from PagePilot.

Terms of Use: https://pagepilot.doublewaterapps.com/terms.html
keywords: epub reader,apple watch,page turn,pdf,audiobook,reading stats,bookshelf,wifi transfer,ebook
promotionalText: Turn pages with Apple Watch Digital Crown — no more reaching for the screen
whatsNew:
Home now continues the right book, with quick access to stats and notes. My Notes is grouped by book.

Clearer Watch page-turn setup, iPad connection status, and a short tip when enabling volume-key page turn.

Polished iPad paywall and full-width settings layouts, circular sheet close buttons, and better dark-mode reader chrome.
